docket_entries.description: (AMENDED) NOTICE OF XYRATEX INTERNATIONAL INC.'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PETITIONER XYRATEX INTERNATIONAL HEARING SET FOR FEB-10-2011 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301
ORDER GRANTING XYRATEX INTERNATIONAL, INC.'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD.
NOTICEOF XYRATEX INTERNATION, INC.'A PETITION TO CONFIRM ARB AWARD, PROOF OF SERVICE, DECLARATION FILED BY PETITIONER XYRATEX INTERNATIONAL HEARING SET FOR FEB-07-2011 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301
REPLY AND NOTICE OF NON-OPPOS IN SUPPORT OF EPTITION FILED BY PETITIONER XYRATEX INTERNATIONAL
MINI-MINUTES FOR FEB-10-2011 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PETITIONER XYRATEX INTERNATIONAL
PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER XYRATEX INTERNATIONAL AS TO RESPONDENT FROST, DAVID JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
MINI-MINUTES FOR FEB-07-2011 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION, 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. PETITIONER XYRATEX INTERNATIONAL'S (AMENDED) PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS OFF CALENDAR DUE TO THE FEBRUARY 7, 2011 RULING AND NO CHALLENGE TO THE ORDER HAVING BEEN ENTERED. THE COURT WENT BACK TO THE RECORD TO CORRECT THE RULING IT MADE EARLIER. THE FEBRUARY 7 ORDER IS INCORRECT AND SHOULD BE VACATED BECAUSE PRIOR TO THE HEARING DATE AN AMENDED NOTICE HAD BEEN FILED CONTINUING THE HEARING. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER XYRATEX INTERNATIONAL'S (AMENDED) PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR FOR INSUFFICIENT PROOF OF SERVICE. THE MOVING PARTY FAILED TO PROVIDE THE COURT WITH PROOF OF SERVICE OF THE JANUARY 10 SERVICE BY HAND DELIVERY AT THE HEARING. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 301/PJB
NOTICE OF PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD, PROOF OF SERVICE, DECLARATION FILED BY PETITIONER XYRATEX INTERNATIONAL HEARING SET FOR APR-07-2011 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301
REPLY AND NOTICE OF NON-OPPOSITION IN SUPPORT OF PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER XYRATEX INTERNATIONAL

LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER XYRATEX INTERNATIONAL, INCORPORATED'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED (TOTAL AMOUNT - $366,894.00). NO OPPOSITION WAS FILED. MOVING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 301/PJB ( RULING VACATED BY COURT)
MINI-MINUTES FOR APR-07-2011 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER/NOTICE OF RULING FILED GRANTING PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER XYRATEX INTERNATIONAL

LAW AND MOTION 301, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER XYRATEX INTERNATIONAL'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. THE PETITIONER PROVIDED AT THE HEARING A PROOF OF SERVICE EXECUTED BY ONE WITH PERSONAL KNOWLEDGE THAT THE MOVING PAPERS WERE PERSONALLY SERVED ON OR BEFORE MARCH 15, 2011. NO OPPOSITION WAS FILED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF XYRATEX INTERNATIONAL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FROST, DAVID $366,894.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $366,894.00, SEE SCANNED DOC
